scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && PORT=5055 PORT_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS=1 npm run dev
scripts.dev:stable: concurrently -k "cd backend && PORT=5055 PORT_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS=1 npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.qa:release: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run test -- --run && npm --prefix frontend run build && PORT=5055 PORT_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS=1 npm --prefix backend run test:smoke
scripts.qa:runtime: npm run dev:stable:keep && npm run dev:stable:health && npm run dev:stable:status && npm run dev:stable:stop
scripts.qa:ultimate: npm run qa:release && npm run qa:runtime
